name: Willow Island
description_short: Willow Island is an outdoor event venue and camping facility operated by Alliant Energy Center in Madison, Wisconsin—not a financial services provider.
description_long:
Willow Island is a 29-acre outdoor event facility that is part of the Alliant Energy Center of Dane County in Madison, Wisconsin. The venue operates as a multi-purpose entertainment and event space within a larger 164-acre campus that includes the Veterans Memorial Coliseum, Exhibition Hall, New Holland Pavilions, and Arena Building. The facility has been incorrectly categorized as a payday-alternative lender, but it operates exclusively as a venue rental and event space with no financial services operations.

Willow Island offers event hosting and overnight camping accommodations. The venue features natural green space surrounded by ponds, weather-resistant limestone walkways, and towering willow trees overlooking downtown Madison's skyline. The facility provides electrical power (1,200 amp, 208 volt, 3 phase), paved roadways and parking, and can accommodate festivals, concerts, corporate events, and outdoor gatherings. Camping is available on a self-registration, first-come, first-served basis, with the North Lot offering 36 sites with 30-amp power and water hookups, and Willow Island itself providing 84 additional sites with varying power options (25 with 50-amp and 59 with 30-amp service).

Willow Island distinguishes itself through its natural setting and comprehensive on-site amenities, including 5,800 paved parking spaces, 24-hour restroom and shower access via New Holland Pavilion 1, and proximity to downtown Madison (1.5 miles away) and the Capitol City Bike Path. The venue's dual focus on day events and overnight camping creates flexibility for multi-day events and festival experiences. Its location near major roads (John Nolen Drive and Rimrock Road) provides visibility and accessibility for visitors.

The critical caveat is that Willow Island is a venue rental facility with zero connection to consumer financial services. Its current categorization as a payday-alternative lender is entirely inaccurate. The website contains no evidence of lending, credit services, loan products, or any financial services whatsoever. This appears to be a data classification error that should be corrected to reflect its actual business as an event venue.
services: Outdoor event venue rental for festivals and concerts
Corporate event hosting and private gatherings
30-amp and 50-amp power hookups for RVs and campers
Water hookups at North Lot camping sites
Paved roadways and walkways throughout the facility
Three-phase electrical power supply (1,200 amp, 208 volt)
Catering services (referenced on main Alliant Energy Center site)
24-hour restroom and shower facilities for campers
Request for Proposal services for event planning
pros: 29 acres of natural green space with scenic willow trees and pond surroundings
Over 5,800 paved and lit parking spaces on-site and nearby
On-site camping with 120 total sites, including 50-amp and 30-amp power hookups
24-hour restroom and shower access for campers via New Holland Pavilion 1
1,200 amp electrical power available for events
Proximity to downtown Madison (1.5 miles) and Capitol City Bike Path
Portable amenities including ticketing booths, trash receptacles, and picnic tables
cons: Construction on John Nolen Drive (starting October 13) may cause significant access delays to the facility
Camping is first-come, first-served with no guaranteed reservations (unless otherwise noted for specific events)
Self-registration camping process requires campers to handle their own check-in
best_for: Event organizers planning festivals, concerts, and large outdoor gatherings
Festival and event attendees seeking on-site overnight camping accommodations
Corporate event planners needing scenic outdoor venue with full infrastructure
diagnosis: Willow Island is an outdoor event venue and camping facility, not a financial services provider. It has been miscategorized as a payday-alternative lender despite offering zero financial services. This company should be recategorized or removed from consumer finance databases entirely, as it is exclusively an event space and RV camping facility operated by the Alliant Energy Center.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
